description: Email subject regeneration — re-generates email subject lines incorporating user feedback. Reuses the initial generation prompts with feedback injected via the {feedback_section} template variable.

prompts.instruction:
{feedback_section}

## Output Format (MANDATORY)
Return clean plain text output (no markdown or bullet points or colon) in this format for each created subject, do not duplicate.

Subject_[number]: [Text subject]

Put a separator string "-----" after each created subject.

As the final output, after generated subjects, create a recommendation to pick best subject and explain why, use in this format.

RECOMMENDATION: Subject [Put generated subject number] - [the subject text, generated above what you recommend to use]

---

Input:
{newsletter_text}
